top_signals.title: Sherritt Warns of Going-Concern Risk After Trump Cuba Sanctions
top_signals.summary: A Canadian miner that is one of Cuba’s biggest foreign investors warned investors that its ability to carry on as a going concern is in doubt after Donald Trump expanded US sanctions on the Caribbean nation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin bounces off new 2026 price lows: Will US stock weakness push BTC lower?
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin’s trek into new 2026 lows continued as spot BTC ETF outflows, a bearish monthly options expiry and Strategy’s unrealized losses widened its gap with AI-connected stock returns.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Korean Stocks Tumble 8% as Chipmakers Slide, Trading Halted
top_signals.summary: South Korean stocks fell as renewed selling in chipmakers highlighted their heightened sensitivity to swings in global artificial-intelligence sentiment.
